_comment: Mailgun email send via MCP. No widely-shipped MCP server is published at @modelcontextprotocol/server-mailgun yet — this template makes the contract explicit so a user with a Mailgun MCP server (their own, or one published later) can drop it in by editing the command. To use a local stdio server, replace command/args with the path to your build (e.g. command: node, args: [/path/to/mailgun-mcp.js]).
name: mailgun
